slides.body: Modern AI systems rely on vast training data. A new study by Anaxi and Carnegie Mellon explores how to define the value of this data and establish clear revenue models for reusable AI components and agent-driven environments.
slides.visual_direction: Minimal, structured layout. Black/white base with blue accent. Left-aligned text. No gradients. Small right-pointing arrow.
slides.source_topic_headline: Anaxi, Carnegie Mellon study AI data value, revenue models

slides.body: A TechRadar report suggests treating AI agents as junior engineers. This approach ensures safer, more effective use by acknowledging their probabilistic nature and need for oversight, fostering sustainable innovation.
slides.visual_direction: Minimal, structured layout. Black/white base with orange accent. Left-aligned text. No gradients. Small right-pointing arrow.
slides.source_topic_headline: Treating AI Agents as Junior Engineers: Oversight for Productivity and Safety
